name: Summit of the Frozen Peaks
description: The world falls away on every side from this broad, ice-shattered summit, the highest point of the Frozen Peaks. Great fangs of blue ice ring the plateau like the walls of a ruined hall, and the ground is strewn with frost-rimed bones. This is a lair, and the cold here is a living, hungry thing that gnaws at the marrow.
ambient_messages: A blast of glacial wind tears across the summit, and the fangs of ice keen like a war-horn.
The frozen bones underfoot shift and rattle as the cold deepens.
The sky darkens with driving snow, and for a heartbeat something vast seems to stir in the storm.
